_comment: CRD UI element selectors. Update via discover-crd-selectors.js if CRD UI changes.
_last_verified: 2026-04-27 (hardware confirmed via Phase E live CRD session)
_notes: All CRD interactive elements are <div role=button|checkbox> — never native <button> or <mwc-switch>.
Side panel auto-hides; elements may show getBoundingClientRect=0 even though the DOM node exists.
Hold Left Shift to surface the side panel without mouse hover (matches CRD setting 'Press and hold left shift to access options').
Sections are collapsible; opening 'Show/hide section: Data transfer' surfaces clipboard, 'Input controls' surfaces system keys.

begin_button.appears_when: Pre-connect screen only — disappears after session establishes.

pin_options_panel.purpose: Keep side panel visible — useful for agent-driven sessions to avoid auto-hide.

show_window_switcher.purpose: Mac mini Cmd-Tab equivalent through CRD.

remote_keyboard_toggle.purpose: Surface on-screen keyboard for special keys not in the snapshot.

send_text_textarea.purpose: Server-rendered textarea for paste-as-text into the Mac mini focus.
